applications.name: Tenant Portal
applications.description: Web portal for tenant self-service - rent payments, maintenance requests, document access
applications.notes: Key digital touchpoint for tenants. High satisfaction scores. Needs AI chatbot integration.

applications.name: Property Management System
applications.description: Legacy ERP for property portfolio management, tenant contracts, and financial reporting
applications.notes: Critical for operations but outdated tech stack. Replacement planned for Q3 2026. High maintenance costs.

applications.name: Maintenance Scheduler
applications.description: Mobile app for facility maintenance work order scheduling and tracking
applications.notes: Well-adopted by field teams. Integration with IoT sensors planned.

applications.name: Financial Reporting Suite
applications.description: BI platform for property financial analytics and regulatory reporting
applications.notes: Modern stack, high user satisfaction. Expanding to predictive analytics.

applications.name: Lease Management Tool
applications.description: Contract lifecycle management for tenant leases, renewals, and amendments
applications.notes: Good integration with CRM. Consider AI-powered clause analysis.

applications.name: Building Access Control
applications.description: Physical access system for building entry, parking, and security zones
applications.notes: Critical security infrastructure. Needs mobile app modernization.

applications.name: Energy Monitoring System
applications.description: IoT platform for real-time energy consumption tracking across property portfolio
applications.notes: Strategic investment for ESG compliance. AI-powered optimization in development.

applications.name: Rent Collection Portal
applications.description: Payment gateway for rent collection, late fees, and automated reminders
applications.notes: Overlaps with Tenant Portal payment module. Consolidation opportunity.

applications.name: CRM - Tenant Relations
applications.description: Customer relationship management for tenant engagement and retention
applications.notes: Core platform for tenant lifecycle management. AI Einstein features enabled.

applications.name: Document Archive
applications.description: Legacy document management system for contracts, invoices, and compliance docs
applications.notes: Migration to SharePoint Online planned. Retire by Q4 2026.
